words.exampleArabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ تُحْضِرَ بِطَاقَةَ الصُّعُودِ قَبْلَ الدُّخُولِ إِلَى الطَّائِرَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Moraš donijeti kartu za ukrcaj prije ulaska u avion.
words.exampleEn: You must bring the boarding pass before entering the plane.

words.exampleArabic: سَيَمُرُّ الرَّكْبُ فِي دُبَيٍّ لِلْعُبُورِ إِلَى لَنْدَنَ.
words.exampleBs: Putnici će proći kroz Dubai u tranzitu prema Londonu.
words.exampleEn: The passengers will pass through Dubai in transit to London.

words.exampleArabic: لَدَيْنَا تَوَقُّفٌ مُؤَقَّتٌ لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِ سَاعَاتٍ فِي إِسْطَنْبُولَ.
words.exampleBs: Imamo trosatno međuslijetanje u Istanbulu.
words.exampleEn: We have a three-hour layover in Istanbul.

words.exampleArabic: يَفْتَحُ مَكْتَبُ تَسْجِيلِ الْوُصُولِ قَبْلَ ثَلَاثِ سَاعَاتٍ مِنَ الإِقْلَاعِ.
words.exampleBs: Šalter za prijavu se otvara tri sata prije polijetanja.
words.exampleEn: The check-in desk opens three hours before departure.

words.exampleArabic: تَوَجَّهَ الرُّكَّابُ إِلَى بَوَّابَةِ الْمُغَادَرَةِ رَقْمِ خَمْسَةَ عَشَرَ.
words.exampleBs: Putnici su se uputili prema izlazu broj petnaest.
words.exampleEn: The passengers headed to departure gate number fifteen.

words.exampleArabic: اصْطَفَّ الْمُسَافِرُونَ فِي طَابُورٍ طَوِيلٍ عِنْدَ الْجَوَازَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Putnici su stajali u dugačkom redu kod granične kontrole.
words.exampleEn: Travelers stood in a long queue at passport control.

words.exampleArabic: يَجِبُ مَلْءُ الإِقْرَارِ الْجُمْرُكِيِّ عِنْدَ الْوُصُولِ.
words.exampleBs: Carinsku deklaraciju treba ispuniti pri dolasku.
words.exampleEn: The customs declaration must be filled in upon arrival.

words.exampleArabic: يُفَضِّلُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الشَّبَابِ النُّزُولَ فِي النُّزُلِ الشَّبَابِيِّ لِتَوْفِيرِ الْمَالِ.
words.exampleBs: Mnogi mladi preferiraju odsjesti u hostelu radi uštede novca.
words.exampleEn: Many young people prefer staying in a youth hostel to save money.

words.exampleArabic: اسْتَأْجَرَ شَقَّةً مَفْرُوشَةً لِمُدَّةِ أُسْبُوعَيْنِ فِي الْقَاهِرَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Iznajmio je namješteni stan na dvije sedmice u Kairu.
words.exampleEn: He rented a furnished apartment for two weeks in Cairo.

words.exampleArabic: مَوْعِدُ تَسْجِيلِ الْمُغَادَرَةِ هُوَ الثَّانِيَةَ عَشَرَ ظُهْرًا.
words.exampleBs: Rok za odjavu je podne.
words.exampleEn: The check-out time is noon.

words.exampleArabic: يُوَفِّرُ الْفُنْدُقُ مَرَافِقَ مُتَعَدِّدَةً مِنْهَا مَسْبَحٌ وَصَالَةُ رِيَاضَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Hotel nudi različite sadržaje, uključujući bazen i teretanu.
words.exampleEn: The hotel provides various amenities including a pool and gym.

words.exampleArabic: طَلَبَ وَجْبَةَ الْإِفْطَارِ عَبْرَ خِدْمَةِ الْغُرَفِ.
words.exampleBs: Naručio je doručak putem room servicea.
words.exampleEn: He ordered breakfast through room service.

words.exampleArabic: سَأَلَ الْمُوَظَّفَ الرَّئِيسِيَّ عَنْ أَفْضَلِ الْمَطَاعِمِ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Pitao je concierge za najbolje restorane u gradu.
words.exampleEn: He asked the concierge about the best restaurants in the city.

words.exampleArabic: حَجَزَتِ الشَّرَكَةُ رَحْلَةً مَحْجُوزَةً لِمَوَظَّفِيهَا.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija je rezervirala charter let za svoje zaposlenike.
words.exampleEn: The company booked a charter flight for its employees.

words.exampleArabic: أَقَمْنَا بِالْقُرْبِ مِنْ مَحَطَّةِ الْقِطَارِ لِسُهُولَةِ التَّنَقُّلِ.
words.exampleBs: Odsjeli smo u blizini željezničke stanice radi lakšeg kretanja.
words.exampleEn: We stayed near the railway station for ease of transportation.

words.exampleArabic: خُذِ الْمَخْرَجَ الثَّالِثَ عِنْدَ الدَّوَّارِ.
words.exampleBs: Uzmi treći izlaz na kružnom toku.
words.exampleEn: Take the third exit at the roundabout.

words.exampleArabic: هَذَا شَارِعٌ بِاتِّجَاهٍ وَاحِدٍ؛ لَا يُمْكِنُكَ الْعُبُورُ مِنْ هُنَا.
words.exampleBs: Ovo je jednosmjerna ulica; ne možeš ovuda proći.
words.exampleEn: This is a one-way street; you cannot pass through here.

words.exampleArabic: تَجَنَّبِ الْقِيَادَةَ فِي أَوْقَاتِ ذِرْوَةِ الِازْدِحَامِ.
words.exampleBs: Izbjegavaj vožnju u vršnim satima.
words.exampleEn: Avoid driving during rush hour.

words.exampleArabic: تَأَخَّرَ الْوُصُولُ بِسَبَبِ اِزْدِحَامِ الْمُرُورِ.
words.exampleBs: Dolazak se odgodio zbog prometne gužve.
words.exampleEn: The arrival was delayed due to traffic congestion.

words.exampleArabic: أَرْسَلَتِ الْوَكَالَةُ جَدْوَلَ الرِّحْلَةِ قَبْلَ أُسْبُوعٍ.
words.exampleBs: Agencija je poslala itinerer tjedan dana ranije.
words.exampleEn: The agency sent the itinerary a week in advance.

words.exampleArabic: شَارَكَ السُّيَّاحُ فِي جَوْلَةٍ مَعَ مَرْشِدٍ حَوْلَ الْمَعَالِمِ الْأَثَرِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Turisti su učestvovali u vođenoj turi po arheološkim lokalitetima.
words.exampleEn: The tourists participated in a guided tour of the archaeological sites.

words.exampleArabic: تُدْرَجُ الْمَدِينَةُ الْقَدِيمَةُ ضِمْنَ قَائِمَةِ مَوَاقِعِ التُّرَاثِ الْعَالَمِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Stari grad je uvršten na listu svjetskih heritage lokacija.
words.exampleEn: The old city is listed among world heritage sites.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَدُّ تَذَوُّقُ الْمَطْبَخِ الْمَحَلِّيِّ جُزْءًا أَصِيلًا مِنَ السَّفَرِ.
words.exampleBs: Kušanje lokalne kuhinje smatra se suštinskim dijelom putovanja.
words.exampleEn: Tasting the local cuisine is considered an essential part of traveling.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَزِّزُ التَّبَادُلُ الثَّقَافِيُّ التَّفَاهُمَ بَيْنَ الشُّعُوبِ.
words.exampleBs: Kulturna razmjena jača razumijevanje između naroda.
words.exampleEn: Cultural exchange enhances understanding between peoples.

words.exampleArabic: أَصَابَهُ إِرْهَاقُ الرِّحْلَةِ بَعْدَ الطَّيَرَانِ لِاثْنَتَيْ عَشَرَةَ سَاعَةً.
words.exampleBs: Pogodio ga je jet lag nakon dvanaest sati leta.
words.exampleEn: He was hit by jet lag after twelve hours of flying.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى تَأْشِيرَةٍ لِدُخُولِ بَعْضِ الدُّوَلِ.
words.exampleBs: Treba mu viza za ulazak u neke zemlje.
words.exampleEn: He needs a visa to enter certain countries.

words.exampleArabic: حَصَلَ عَلَى إِقَامَةٍ مُؤَقَّتَةٍ لِمُدَّةِ سَنَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Dobio je privremenu dozvolu boravka na godinu dana.
words.exampleEn: He obtained a temporary residence permit for one year.

words.exampleArabic: احْجِزْ حُجْرَةً مُزْدَوَجَةً لَيْلَتَيْنِ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ.
words.exampleBs: Rezervirajte, molim vas, dvokrevetnu sobu na dvije noći.
words.exampleEn: Please book a double room for two nights.

words.exampleArabic: مَوْعِدُ الْمُغَادَرَةِ السَّاعَةُ السَّادِسَةُ صَبَاحًا.
words.exampleBs: Polazak je u šest ujutro.
words.exampleEn: The departure time is six in the morning.

words.exampleArabic: يُتَوَقَّعُ الْوُصُولُ إِلَى الْمَطَارِ فِي تَمَامِ الثَّانِيَةَ عَشَرَ.
words.exampleBs: Očekuje se dolazak na aerodrom tačno u podne.
words.exampleEn: Arrival at the airport is expected at exactly noon.

words.exampleArabic: يُسْمَحُ بِحَقِيبَةِ يَدٍ وَاحِدَةٍ فِي الطَّائِرَةِ.
words.exampleBs: U avionu je dopuštena jedna ručna torba.
words.exampleEn: One carry-on bag is allowed on the plane.

words.exampleArabic: أَبْلَغَ عَنْ فُقْدَانِ أَمْتِعَتِهِ فِي مَكْتَبِ الْمَطَارِ.
words.exampleBs: Prijavio je gubitak prtljage u aerodromskom uredu.
words.exampleEn: He reported his lost luggage at the airport office.

words.exampleArabic: أَيْنَ أَقْرَبُ مَكْتَبٍ لِصَرْفِ الْعُمْلَاتِ؟
words.exampleBs: Gdje je najbliža mjenjačnica?
words.exampleEn: Where is the nearest currency exchange office?

words.exampleArabic: يُوصَى بِشِرَاءِ تَأْمِينِ السَّفَرِ قَبْلَ أَيِّ رِحْلَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Preporučuje se kupovina putničkog osiguranja prije svakog putovanja.
words.exampleEn: It is recommended to purchase travel insurance before any trip.

words.exampleArabic: تَنْطَلِقُ الْحَافِلَةُ السِّيَاحِيَّةُ مِنَ الْفُنْدُقِ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
words.exampleBs: Turistički autobus polazi iz hotela svako jutro.
words.exampleEn: The tourist bus departs from the hotel every morning.

words.exampleArabic: نَظَّمَتْ وَكَالَةُ السَّفَرِ رِحْلَةً كَامِلَةً بِسِعْرٍ مُنَاسِبٍ.
words.exampleBs: Turistička agencija je organizirala kompletno putovanje po povoljnoj cijeni.
words.exampleEn: The travel agency organized a complete trip at a reasonable price.

words.exampleArabic: شَرَحَ الْمَرْشِدُ السِّيَاحِيُّ تَارِيخَ الْمَعْلَمِ بِتَفْصِيلٍ.
words.exampleBs: Turistički vodič je detaljno objasnio historiju lokaliteta.
words.exampleEn: The tourist guide explained the history of the landmark in detail.

words.exampleArabic: تَجَاوَزَتْ حَقِيبَتُهُ مِيزَانَ الطَّائِرَةِ فَدَفَعَ رُسُومًا إِضَافِيَّةً.
words.exampleBs: Njegova torba je premašila dozvoljenu težinu prtljage pa je platio dodatne naknade.
words.exampleEn: His bag exceeded the baggage allowance so he paid additional fees.

words.exampleArabic: تَوَقَّفَ عِنْدَ مَحَطَّةِ الْوَقُودِ لِتَعْبِئَةِ خَزَّانِ السَّيَّارَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Stao je na benzinskoj stanici da napuni rezervoar auta.
words.exampleEn: He stopped at the fuel station to fill the car's tank.

words.exampleArabic: حَدَثَ تَعْطِيلٌ فِي مَوَاعِيدِ الرَّحَلَاتِ بِسَبَبِ سُوءِ الطَّقْسِ.
words.exampleBs: Došlo je do kašnjenja letova zbog lošeg vremena.
words.exampleEn: There was a delay in flight schedules due to bad weather.

words.exampleArabic: انْتَظَرَ الرُّكَّابُ فِي صَالَةِ الْمُغَادَرَةِ لِمُدَّةِ سَاعَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Putnici su čekali u odlaznoj hali sat vremena.
words.exampleEn: The passengers waited in the departure lounge for an hour.

words.exampleArabic: تَبْلُغُ الْمَسَافَةُ بَيْنَ الْمَدِينَتَيْنِ ثَلَاثَمِائَةِ كِيلُومِتْرٍ.
words.exampleBs: Udaljenost između dva grada iznosi tristo kilometara.
words.exampleEn: The distance between the two cities is three hundred kilometers.

words.exampleArabic: اخْتَرْنَا مَسَارًا سَاحِلِيًّا لِقُدُومِنَا أَجْمَلَ.
words.exampleBs: Odabrali smo obalni pravac da nam putovanje bude ljepše.
words.exampleEn: We chose a coastal route to make our journey more beautiful.

words.exampleArabic: قَرَّرَ اسْتِئْجَارَ سَيَّارَةٍ لِاسْتِكْشَافِ الْمَنْطِقَةِ بِحُرِّيَّةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Odlučio je iznajmiti auto da slobodno istražuje regiju.
words.exampleEn: He decided to rent a car to explore the region freely.

words.exampleArabic: اشْتَرَى دَلِيلًا سِيَاحِيًّا شَامِلًا لِلْمَدِينَةِ قَبْلَ سَفَرِهِ.
words.exampleBs: Kupio je sveobuhvatni turistički vodič za grad prije svog putovanja.
words.exampleEn: He bought a comprehensive travel guidebook for the city before his trip.

words.exampleArabic: رُسُومُ الدُّخُولِ إِلَى الْمَتْحَفِ خَمْسَةُ دَرَاهِمَ لِلشَّخْصِ.
words.exampleBs: Ulaznica za muzej iznosi pet dirhama po osobi.
words.exampleEn: The admission fee to the museum is five dirhams per person.

words.exampleArabic: فَتَحَ تَطْبِيقَ الْخَرِيطَةِ عَلَى هَاتِفِهِ لِإِيجَادِ الطَّرِيقِ.
words.exampleBs: Otvorio je aplikaciju za mape na svom telefonu da pronađe put.
words.exampleEn: He opened the map application on his phone to find the way.

words.exampleArabic: اشْتَرَى بَعْضَ الْهَدَايَا مِنَ الْمَنْطِقَةِ الْحُرَّةِ فِي الْمَطَارِ.
words.exampleBs: Kupio je neke poklone u duty-free zoni na aerodromu.
words.exampleEn: He bought some gifts from the duty-free zone at the airport.

words.exampleArabic: يُمْكِنُكَ تَسْجِيلُ الْوُصُولِ عَبْرَ الإِنْتَرْنِتِ قَبْلَ أَرْبَعَةٍ وَعِشْرِينَ سَاعَةً.
words.exampleBs: Možeš se prijaviti online dvadeset i četiri sata ranije.
words.exampleEn: You can check in online twenty-four hours in advance.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْجِزُ الْفُنْدُقَ مُبَكِّرًا لِلْحُصُولِ عَلَى سِعْرٍ أَفْضَلَ.
words.exampleBs: Rezervira hotel ranije kako bi dobio bolju cijenu.
words.exampleEn: He books the hotel early to get a better price.

words.exampleArabic: أَحَبَّ أَنْ يَتَجَوَّلَ فِي أَزِقَّةِ الْمَدِينَةِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Volio je lutati ulicama starog grada.
words.exampleEn: He loved to wander the alleys of the old city.

words.exampleArabic: يَسْتَكْشِفُ السَّائِحُونَ الثَّقَافَةَ الْمَحَلِّيَّةَ بِفَضُولٍ.
words.exampleBs: Turisti s radoznalošću istražuju lokalnu kulturu.
words.exampleEn: Tourists explore the local culture with curiosity.

words.en: Can I change my booking date?
words.exampleArabic: هَلْ يُمْكِنُنِي تَغْيِيرُ مَوْعِدِ حَجْزِي دُونَ رُسُومٍ إِضَافِيَّةٍ؟
words.exampleBs: Mogu li promijeniti datum rezervacije bez dodatnih troškova?
words.exampleEn: Can I change my booking date without additional fees?

words.exampleArabic: أَيْنَ أَقْرَبُ مَوْقِفٍ لِلسَّيَّارَاتِ مِنْ هُنَا؟
words.exampleBs: Gdje je najbliže parkiralište odavde?
words.exampleEn: Where is the nearest car park from here?

words.exampleArabic: أُرِيدُ رِحْلَةً ذَهَابًا وَإِيَابًا إِلَى بَيْرُوتَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ.
words.exampleBs: Želim povratnu kartu za Bejrut, molim.
words.exampleEn: I want a round trip to Beirut, please.
